description: VERIFIED LIVE: 腾讯网/腾讯新闻 (QQ News) via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. Article links carry a /rain/a/<id> path with the headline as link text. Navigate the tab to news.qq.com (or another qq.com channel) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: 60 article links — headline + url extracted correctly.

tools.name: qqnews_headlines
tools.description: Article links on the current 腾讯网 page (news.qq.com or a channel). Navigate the tab there first. Returns each story's headline and url (.../rain/a/<id>). VERIFIED (60 articles).
